concept_candidates.label: InformationalAlarmEvent
concept_candidates.description: An alarm type that delivers messages to operators indicating a condition without triggering a change in machine status.
concept_candidates.justification: InformationalAlarm is a stable, reusable alarm type that represents a non‑disruptive notification pattern across documents.

concept_candidates.label: ThermalCutoffDevice

concept_candidates.justification: The candidate represents a stable, reusable safety device concept (thermal cutoff) that appears across multiple documents and aligns with existing ontology classes such as Component and SafetyDevice.
